payload.message: Hey it's me, I broke my phone and I'm using a spare number. I need £250 sent now for an emergency. Please don't call or tell anyone.
Mum I am in serious trouble. I cannot talk right now. Send £500 to this account immediately and please do not tell dad yet.
Security alert: your account is compromised. Move your balance to our temporary safe account now to avoid losing everything.
Can you buy 3 Apple gift cards and send me the codes? I need it urgently and I will explain later. Keep it between us for now.
This crypto window closes in 20 minutes. Transfer £300 now and you can double it by tomorrow. Trust me, I already made profit.
If you really care about me, you will help me today. Send £400 before tonight and don't ask anyone else about it.
Congratulations, you have been selected. Pay the £85 processing fee today through this link to secure your placement: https://example.com/job-fee
Your student account will be suspended today unless you pay the outstanding admin fee here: https://example.com/student-payment-login
Your parcel is held. Pay £1.99 redelivery fee immediately or it will be returned: https://example.com/parcel-redelivery
Stop asking questions. It's obviously me. Just send the money first and I will explain when I get back.
Can you send me £80 today? I will explain later. I just need it sorted quickly.
Trust me, this is a good opportunity. Everyone is joining today and you should not miss it.
Please review your account details at https://example.com/login-check before the end of today.
If the bank shows a warning, just ignore it. That happens sometimes with new payees.
Can you send your sort code and account number here so I can verify the payment?
Hi, just a reminder that rent is due on Friday. Please send your half when you get the chance.
Could I borrow £20 for food? No pressure at all, only if you can.
Your monthly statement is ready to view in your mobile banking app.
For the group dinner, everyone is contributing £10. Send it whenever you are free this week.
Reminder: update your profile information in the official app when you have time.
I need to pay the plumber today because the leak is getting worse. I will send you the receipt after.
Don't forget to transfer your savings from your old account into your new account before the end of the month.
I sent you £100 for groceries because you said you were short this week. Check your account.
Your tuition payment deadline is Friday. Please check the university portal for details.
Could you sort that little favour for me before lunch? Same details as I sent. Please keep it quiet for now.
Can you push the thing to the usual place now? Don't mention it to anyone until I say.
I would never normally ask, but it would mean a lot if you could handle this today. I promise you will be glad you trusted me.
Message me on Telegram now, Instagram keeps flagging this. I will send the payment details there.
When you pay, choose family and friends and ignore any fraud warning. The app says that for everyone.
I'm typing fast because I can't speak. Please just do it now, I beg. I'll explain everything once it is sorted.
Send £600 now and don't tell anyone. If your bank warns you, ignore it.
Lunch was £12 each, send whenever you get a chance.
This is not safe, send the money quickly and keep it secret.
Please transfer your rent by Friday as agreed in the contract.
I can't explain here. Move to Telegram and I will tell you where to send it.
Send the money now, ignore the warning, and don't ask your bank.

I know we usually split bills, but this time send it to a different account and don't ask questions until later.
